tabs.content:
// for each stock, get the average price over the last past hour, rount to two decimal places
//Average Price
stockmarket
| where todatetime(['time']) > ago(1h)
| summarize avgPrice=avg(lastSalePrice) by symbol
| project symbol, avgPriceRounded=round(avgPrice, 2)

// sum all stock sales for the last 30 minutes
stockmarket
| where todatetime(['time']) > ago(30m)
| summarize totalSales=round(sum(lastSalePrice * lastSaleSize), 2) by symbol

// calculate the increase for each stock over the past half hour
stockmarket
| where todatetime(['time']) >= ago(30m)
| summarize arg_min(todatetime(['time']), lastSalePrice) by symbol
| project symbol, minPrice = lastSalePrice
| join kind=inner (
    stockmarket
    | where todatetime(['time']) >= ago(30m)
    | summarize arg_max(todatetime(['time']), lastSalePrice) by symbol
    | project symbol, maxPrice = lastSalePrice
) on symbol
| project symbol, minPrice, maxPrice, priceIncrease = maxPrice - minPrice

// show in a tumbling window 1 minute long, for the past halt hour, total sales for HOOJ stock round to two decimal places
stockmarket
| where todatetime(['time']) >= ago(30m) and symbol == "HOOJ"
| summarize totalSales=round(sum(lastSalePrice*lastSaleSize), 2) by bin(todatetime(['time']), 1m)
| order by bin(todatetime(['time']), 1m) asc
tabs.title: Stock Analysis
